settings.site_description: Luxury jewelry boutique in Islamorada focused on bridal pieces, nautical collections, repairs, and private consultations.

sections.title: Galante's Jewelry by the Sea
sections.alt_text: Luxury nautical jewelry showcase in Islamorada, Florida Keys with ocean background

sections.title: Barefoot Luxury in Islamorada
sections.content_text: We curate and craft fine nautical jewelry designed to celebrate the spirit of the Florida Keys. Whether you're marking an anniversary, planning a destination wedding, or restoring an heirloom timepiece, our concierge service ensures every detail is attended to with master craftsmanship.
sections.alt_text: Close-up of artisan craftsmanship reflecting barefoot luxury aesthetic

sections.title: Client Testimonials
sections.content_text: "Galante's created the most breathtaking engagement ring for my fiancé. Their attention to detail and personal concierge service made our Islamorada trip truly unforgettable."
sections.subtitle: — Sarah & James, Florida
sections.alt_text: Romantic destination wedding moment in Islamorada

sections.title: Begin Your Story
sections.content_text: Whether you are visiting the Florida Keys or are a local resident, we invite you to experience jewelry curation as it should be.
sections.alt_text: Scenic Florida Keys coastline background for jewelry consultation

featured_items.title: Destination Weddings
featured_items.content_text: Bespoke engagement rings and wedding bands designed to capture your moment by the sea.
featured_items.alt_text: Diamond engagement ring on a sea shell, bridal collection

featured_items.title: Nautical Gold & Silver
featured_items.content_text: Signature pieces honoring our coastal heritage, from mariner links to compass pendants.
featured_items.alt_text: Gold mariner links and nautical jewelry on an ancient sea map

featured_items.title: Master Repair
featured_items.content_text: Entrust your cherished watches and heirlooms to our master jewelers for restoration.
featured_items.alt_text: Master jeweler tools and luxury watch restoration process
